properties.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad student dashboard ('صباح الطالب' / Good Morning Student). RTL Arabic layout with tab-based navigation: Student Overview (active), Study Materials (5), Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank (15), Cases Bank (6). Header includes role switcher (Student/Lawyer), date display, and language toggle. Main content shows a 'This Week' widget (2 upcoming deadlines), four summary stat cards, an upcoming deadlines list (6 items with course associations and due dates), and a recent lecture notes section with status badges (مسودة=draft, تمت المراعة=reviewed). Right sidebar shows a terms mastery progress widget (27% mastered: 4 mastered, 6 taken, 0 learning) and a daily legal news brief from Saudi government entities. Footer confirms PWA capability.

Sanad platform user role for law students. Distinct from the lawyer role; focused on legal education tracking (courses, deadlines, terms, casebook). Role switcher in header allows toggling between student and lawyer modes.

Gamified legal terminology learning system with three mastery states: متقن (mastered), مأخوذ (taken/encountered), قيد التعلم (actively learning). Progress shown as percentage bar and numeric breakdown. 27% mastered in screenshot (4/15 terms).

Right-sidebar news feed (الموجز اليومي) surfacing daily legal and regulatory updates from Saudi government entities. Sources visible in screenshot: وزارة العدل (Ministry of Justice - digital judiciary portal), الموارد البشرية (HR Ministry - remote work policy), هيئة الزكاة (Zakat Authority - VAT reminder).
Status workflow for student lecture notes. States visible in UI: مسودة (draft - yellow badge) and تمت المراعة (reviewed - green badge). Notes are linked to specific courses and dated.

The default landing tab (صباح الطالب) of the student view. Acts as a dashboard aggregating: this-week deadline count, four summary stat cards (courses/deadlines/terms/cases), recent upcoming deadlines, latest lecture notes, terms mastery widget, and daily legal brief. Subtitle: 'تتبع قانوني — تتبع محاضراتك، مواعيدك، مصطلحاتك، وقضاياك'.
